overview.description: Admissions under the J&K PMSSS (Prime Minister’s Special Scholarship Scheme) are offered to eligible students from Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh through AICTE centralized allotment.

admission_process: Obtain allotment letter from PMSSS Portal (AICTE)
Report to DSCE Building No.1, Room No.006 for verification
Verification of allotment letter and original documents
Upload scanned documents in student login
Submit allotment letter with application number at fee section
documents_required: PMSSS Allotment Letter issued by AICTE
Parent PAN Card or Aadhaar Card (Soft Copy)
Three sets of photocopies of all documents

document_upload_requirements.note: Soft copies from Sl No.1–6 must be uploaded on the college portal
